Operational notes
- Credit decisions were based on sanitized numeric payload presence/richness and the existing science findings summary, not elapsed runtime.
- Zero credit was assigned to empty results, results missing a sanitized artifact, known data-quality-blocked experiments, and four otherwise valid results held back to respect the 10,000-credit session cap.
